home.ctaDesc: Create your account and fill your profile in four quick steps to become a featured candidate.
home.heroDesc: Job Intel bridges the gap between ambition and opportunity. We use ethical AI and human insight to create a transparent, efficient job market for everyone.
home.purposeTitle: We are democratizing access to professional growth.
home.purposeDesc: At Job Intel, we believe that talent is equally distributed, but opportunity is not. Our platform leverages advanced analytics to level the playing field, giving every candidate the insights they need to succeed and every company the tools to find the perfect fit without bias.
home.missionDesc: To make job market intelligence accessible, transparent, and actionable for everyone, everywhere.
home.visionDesc: A world where talent meets opportunity instantly, powered by ethical AI and human insight.
home.testimonialText: Job Intel didn't just find me a job; it helped me understand my worth in the market.
home.whyTitle: Why Top Talent Chooses Job Intel
home.whySubtitle: We're more than just a job board. We're your career intelligence partner.
home.why1Desc: Our algorithms understand context, not just keywords, ensuring better fits.
home.why2Desc: Every company is vetted for culture, stability, and authentic opportunities.
home.why3Desc: Salary trends, skill gap analysis, and career pathing tools included.
home.why4Desc: Your data is yours. Control who sees your profile and when.
home.journeySubtitle: From a garage idea to a global platform.
home.journey1Desc: Founded in a small garage with a big idea: fixing the broken hiring process through transparency.
home.journey2Desc: Raised $15M to expand our AI capabilities and grow the team of data scientists.
home.journey3Desc: Expanded operations to 3 continents, serving thousands of daily users and Fortune 500 companies.
home.teamSubtitle: The passionate team of engineers, designers, and dreamers building the future of work.
home.footerCtaTitle: Ready to transform your career path?
home.footerCtaDesc: Join thousands of professionals finding their dream jobs with Job Intel's advanced matching technology.
home.footerTagline: Making the job market transparent, efficient, and fair for everyone.

about.title: Democratizing Careers through Data Intelligence
about.subtitle: Job Intel bridges the gap between ambition and opportunity. We use ethical AI and human insight to create a transparent, efficient job market for everyone.
about.feature1Desc: Upload your CV to instantly parse your experiences, skills, and projects using our state-of-the-art AI parsing tool.
about.feature2Desc: Validate your capabilities with real-time coding and problem-solving tests evaluated by certified evaluation algorithms.
about.feature3Desc: Connect with top companies through our merit-based system that highlights your skills, not just your background.
about.ourStoryDesc: Founded with the vision of making professional recruitment fair and direct, Job Intel has grown to become the trust anchor between recruiters and verified talent. We continuously refine our matching engines to ensure candidates receive the career outcomes they deserve.
about.value2: Privacy by design for personal details

contact.subtitle: Have questions about Job Intel? We're here to help. Send us a message and our team will respond within 24 hours.
contact.infoDesc: Reach out directly through any of our channels or submit the form.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your trust is our priority. Read how we protect and manage your personal data at Job Intel.
privacy.encryptionDesc: All your structural files and personal metadata are stored securely using AES-256 level encryption, maintaining absolute candidate privacy.
privacy.sec1Desc: When you upload a resume, our parser extracts profile fields (experience, projects, skills). This data is processed strictly to match you with career opportunities and is never shared without your permission.
privacy.sec2Desc: We utilize anti-cheat tools during assessments (such as monitoring window focus changes) to guarantee merit-based verification scores for recruiters, ensuring fairness across the network.
privacy.sec3Desc: You maintain full ownership of your profile. At any point, you can download your data, limit recruiters' visibility in your settings panel, or deactivate/delete your account permanently.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers. Explore how Job Intel works.
faqs.q1: How does the AI resume parsing work?
faqs.a1: When you upload your CV, our AI parses the text structure, extracts details like your work history, skills, education, and links, and automatically populates your profile fields so you don't have to fill them manually.
faqs.q2: What is a Verified Talent score?
faqs.a2: By taking our AI-generated skill assessments, you can achieve a verified badge and score. Top scores are highlighted to recruiters, showing that your technical capabilities have been tested and verified.
faqs.q3: How is my personal information protected?
faqs.a3: We encrypt your files and personal details using enterprise-level AES-256 standards. Recruiters only see what is relevant to the job, and you can adjust your privacy settings to control your visibility at any time.
faqs.q4: Can I retake an assessment if I fail?
faqs.a4: Yes, but there is a cooldown period of 60 days between assessment attempts to ensure credibility. You can practice in the meantime and retake the test when the cooldown expires.
